description_long: This object is a portable military-style radio receiver, featuring a rugged rectangular body with two main compartments connected by a sturdy frame. It is equipped with a long, thin metal antenna extending vertically from one side, and a coiled cable leading to a circular speaker or microphone unit. The casing appears to be made of textured metal or hard plastic, with reinforced corners and visible fasteners for durability. There are two brown carrying straps attached to the sides, suggesting it is designed for field use and easy transport. The top surface includes several knobs and switches, likely for tuning and volume control, and a small protruding handle for carrying.
description: A rugged, portable military-style radio receiver with a long antenna, coiled cable, and brown carrying straps. The body is rectangular and reinforced, with visible knobs and a circular speaker or microphone.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two main compartments, the long vertical antenna, and the coiled cable connecting to the circular speaker or microphone.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the brown carrying straps, the top-mounted knobs and switches, and the circular speaker or microphone resting on the ground.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the antenna, cable, and the rectangular structure of the radio receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the compartments, the brown straps, and the cable extending outward.
